name: Cipher
description:
I have beef with this cat so I made her the dumbest slut around.

This is honestly quite a low-effort bot, but I was also surprised by how good it is; that's why I decided to post it. If you are looking for something more honest to an in-game Cipher, this is not it. This is very much just smut, she will probably offer to have sex with you in the 2nd message.

I made her AnyPov, but she is very much blowjob focused. So ladies, maybe grab your futa persona?

The backstory is very complex. One day she offered to suck you off on the street. You agreed (because obviously you would, you desperate horny fuck) and now she lives with you...
